content.en:
"Can you please move the Sixth Realm Beings who have walked out of our 4000th Territory and let them come over and take us out of here?"

A Fourth Realm said.

"No!" the Earthquake Sea Realm Lord shook his head, "We can't contact them, and those Sixth Realms actually seem to be more difficult to come over, and the price to pay is very high, why did they take us there? Those Sixth Realms have already taken their relatives away, and there is nothing to worry about here." And countless multi-dimensional tribulations have passed, even if they once belonged to the same force, but the later extra-dimensional realms have not seen these sixth realms, and there is no emotion at all. "

The other Fifth Realms bowed their heads silently, knowing that this was the truth.

"Try to improve your cultivation as much as possible, and act when the time comes!"

The Earthquake Sea Realm Lord proposed.

Immediately, these Fifth Realms left one by one and went to prepare in private.

Maybe there are ways to survive in the Fifth Realm, but they won't really say it.

The reason why there is a meeting is also to disrupt the situation, so as to fish in troubled waters, in fact, every fifth realm has its own careful thoughts.

......

Soon after, the Fourth Realm, among many overlord-level extradimensional forces, also learned of the news of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation, and this news gradually spread in the Fourth Realm.

this day.

The Lord of the Extinction Realm came to find Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, I want to invite you to join a Scattered Cultivation Alliance. The Extinction Realm Lord said.

"Invite me to join the Scattered Cultivation Alliance?"

Ye Tian was quite surprised, and he didn't know why.

He knew the situation of the Extinction Realm Lord, he had practiced for several multi-dimensional tribulations, and he had not joined any of the scattered cultivation forces, why did he suddenly enter a scattered cultivation alliance.

"Why is that?"

Ye Tian asked curiously.

"Because of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation!" the Extinction Realm Lord said helplessly.

Ye Tian has been cultivating to improve his strength, and the other replica bodies are either researching, creating their own supreme learning in the Four Realms, or looking for resources, each of the replica bodies is very busy, but they don't know about the recent situation, so they don't know about the Death Multidimensional Tribulation.

"Death Multidimensional Tribulation Isn't it a special multidimensional Tribulation?" Ye Tian asked.

"Hmm!" the Extinction Realm Lord nodded, "According to what I know, the Death Multidimensional Tribulation is a multidimensional tribulation that only occurs once in hundreds of multidimensional tribulations, and the last multidimensional tribulation appeared in the Tribulation Wind, but this time the Multidimensional Tribulation appeared in the Death Tribulation Power. The power of death is very terrifying, for example, the death void outside the extradimensional realm is caused by the death multidimensional tribulation, after hundreds of multidimensional tribulations, this death void still exists, you know the horror of this multidimensional tribulation power. "

Immediately, the Extinction Realm Lord briefly explained the situation of the Death Multidimensional Tribulation.

After listening, Ye Tiandu frowned, and his expression was extremely solemn.

According to the Lord of the Extinction Realm, even if he broke through to the Fifth Realm, he would not be able to protect the Terrans and his family.

"The Death Multidimensional Tribulation will even fall to the Fifth Realm?" Ye Tian was still shocked.

"Yes!" The Extinction Realm Lord also said helplessly: "As far as I know, among the Fifth Realm now, even if it is the kind of Fifth Realm that is extremely hidden and retreats for many multi-dimensional tribulations, there are very few Fifth Realms that have really lived for hundreds of multi-dimensional tribulations, no more than ten. It is said that in the last Death Multidimensional Tribulation, most of the Fifth Realm fell. If you are unlucky, a multi-dimensional catastrophe of death will directly destroy all living beings, which is very normal. "

"The simplest particle, the one who has lived the longest in the current Fifth Realm, has not lived a thousand multidimensional tribulations!"

No matter how powerful the existence of the Fifth Realm is, the ordinary multi-dimensional tribulation will have little impact on them, unless they die by themselves, but they can't survive a thousand multi-dimensional tribulations, and they are not breaking through to the sixth realm.

"The Fifth Realm has fallen, what's the use of the Scattered Cultivation Alliance?" Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Extinction Realm said: "It's not very useful, at least you can get the latest information, everyone exchanges the information, maybe there is hope to find life." In addition, when the Death Multidimensional Tribulation is coming, many Fifth Realms will risk impacting the Fifth Realm. Only by breaking through to the fifth realm can there be a glimmer of hope for survival. "

"Okay, I'll join!"

Even if Ye Tian is confident in his talent, he is not far from the Death Multidimensional Tribulation now, not to mention having the ninth day level combat power, even if it is the tenth day level combat power, he can't survive.

He has the confidence to break through to the fifth realm, or even a more powerful realm, but can he protect the human race and protect his relatives?

Difficult!

It's so hard!

......

The territory of the four thousand, the realm of wind and rain.

Ye Tian and the Extinction Realm Lord came here, and that Scattered Cultivation Alliance was here, and this Scattered Cultivation Alliance had gathered hundreds of thousands of Fourth Realms, all of which were very powerful Fourth Realms, and the weak Fourth Realms were not accepted at all.

When Ye Tian came to the Scattered Cultivation Alliance, he was received by many Fourth Realm bosses of this Scattered Cultivation Alliance.

The Extinction Realm Lord introduced to the other Fourth Realms: "This is the Ye Tian Realm Lord!"

"Ye Tian Realm Lord, is the one who has passed the Sixth Heaven Pass in the Ten Dimensional Heavenly Pass Tower?"

Everyone in the Fourth Realm was shocked, this was a big man, and they didn't have such a strong person in the Scattered Cultivation Alliance.

After all, the Fourth Realm that could possess the combat power of the Sixth Heaven Pass was all from those overlord-level extradimensional forces, and they would not join the Scattered Cultivation Alliance formed by them at all.

But if they knew that Ye Tian actually had the combat power of the Seventh Heaven Pass (good, good), I am afraid that they would be even more shocked.

Of course, Ye Tian will not say it.

Subsequently, Ye Tian officially joined this Scattered Cultivation Alliance, and this Scattered Cultivation Alliance was also named the Wind and Rain Alliance.

The Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance is just an idle organization, which can communicate and trade with each other, etc., but it cannot be used by individuals, if it is used to seize resources and attack the opponent's forces, it is definitely not allowed.

After that, Ye Tian obtained a lot of useful information from the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance, and he also gave some of the intelligence risks he had learned over the years to the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance.

Of course, no one will say the real treasure.

Not long after, Ye Tian obtained a Fifth Realm Inheritance Land from the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance, but if he asked Ye Tian to obtain some inheritance knowledge from it, he needed to share it.

After all, this is the opportunity given by the Wind and Rain Scattered Cultivation Alliance, and Ye Tian has no objection to this.
